seed.content:
We design stillness into built space.

Kanso Studio was founded on the belief that the spaces we inhabit shape how we think, feel, and relate. We practice a hybrid discipline — drawing equally from the Japanese reverence for natural imperfection and the Scandinavian commitment to democratic comfort.

Our Philosophy

Kanso — Simplicity

Eliminate what does not serve. Every element should earn its presence in the room.

Shizen — Naturalness

Materials should be honest. Wood should feel like wood. Stone should carry weight.

Ma — Negative Space

The space between objects matters as much as the objects themselves. We design the emptiness.
